title: Swimming with Seaturtles
body:
# Swimming with Seaturtles

Denver-area band remixed by alphabets (Colin Ward) on **REMIX09** (December 30, 2009). Track: "DENVERAIRPORTCOLORADO [SWIMMING WITH SEATURTLES]."

Confirmed Denver connection implied by title ("Denver Airport Colorado") — consistent with other REMIX09 tracks being local scene peers. No further online presence confirmed yet.

## Research Gaps

- Band members unknown
- Bandcamp / SoundCloud / MySpace presence not yet confirmed
- Only known via REMIX09 track title

## Sources

- [alphabets REMIX09 — Bandcamp](https://alphabets.bandcamp.com/album/remix09)
